visible_observations: A mature dark-skinned woman stands tall in fitted black trousers, heeled boots, a wrapped sleeveless top, broad waist straps, and long braided hair pinned with many thin metal needles.

Copper-orange fissure lines spread across her face, neck, chest, and both arms; one hand reaches open toward the viewer while the other carries a rectangular framed board covered in circular diagrams and writing.
A raised chin, angled hips, direct sidelong gaze, half-smile, and offered hand create poised invitation and controlled social pressure.
strengths: The adult face, curvy fit body, assured stance, direct gesture, pinned braids, and luminous skin fissures create a clear feminine presence with authority.
The board, geometric writing, and visible body-wide cracking link intellectual or occult practice to a physical alteration rather than detached ambient effects.
Restrained copper accents provide hierarchy within the dark clothing and skin markings.
defects: The fitted black leather, wrapped neckline, high heels, exposed cleavage, occult diagram board, and glamorous standing pose form a familiar premium-fantasy sorceress vocabulary before they establish a specific culture or combat method.

The reaching hand reads as invitation, demonstration, or persuasion more strongly than immediate attack, while the carried board reads as equipment or presentation material rather than a threatening tool.
The copper fissures can be interpreted as decorative body art because they do not visibly deform movement, expression, or anatomy.
uncertainties: Unaided inspection cannot determine whether the fissures are painful damage, stored power, tattoos, circuitry, or chosen ornament.
The practical combat function of the board and offered hand is not visually certain.

visible_observations: Three alternatives show the same tall braided woman with needle-crowned hair, fitted layered clothing, heeled boots, a rectangular diagram board, and one expressive free hand.

Candidate A offers a low open palm, candidate B cradles the board while pinching or signaling near the face, and candidate C plants a wide stance with one arm extended in a stop or projection gesture.
strengths: Needle-tipped hair, long braids, board, and outstretched arm provide consistent recognizable cues across all three poses.
Candidate C creates the strongest lateral action line and Candidate B the clearest intimate calculating gesture.
defects: The sheet presents three pose variants of one body, outfit, prop, and premise rather than materially different silhouette concepts.
The rectangular board hangs as a secondary block in each outline, while the exterior body remains a conventional slim or curvy fashion-caster silhouette.
Needles and braids are thin details that contribute little to the filled outer contour at distance.
uncertainties: The silhouette evidence does not show whether the board changes form, enters the action, or affects the body outline during combat.

visible_observations: An attractive adult face tilts slightly back and sideways toward the viewer, with one brow raised, the other relaxed, eyelids partly lowered, direct eye contact, and a small asymmetric closed-mouth smile.
The extended hand enters the crop at right, while copper fissures cross the forehead, cheeks, lips, neck, and upper chest beneath needle-pinned braids.
strengths: Raised chin, unequal brows, narrowed appraisal, and restrained smile communicate confident evaluation and a controlled invitation rather than blank beauty posing.
The visible offered hand agrees with the face's socially directed attention toward the viewer.
defects: The smooth half-smile and lowered lids remain close to a familiar seductive or superior glamour expression, without a visible fear, strain, shame, hunger, or loss of control.
The fissures do not alter muscle tension or expression, so they read more as surface pattern than as an active psychological cost.
uncertainties: The unaided read could be recruitment, bargain, seduction, condescension, reassurance, or simple confidence; the intended demand and hidden risk are not decisive.

visible_observations: At native size, a tall feminine figure, long dark hair, extended hand, carried rectangular board, narrow waist, and separated heeled legs remain visible.
Copper fissures, facial asymmetry, hair needles, board diagrams, layered tailoring, and hand articulation disappear into the dark body and background.
strengths: The opposition of offered hand and hanging rectangular prop supplies a readable left-right gesture structure.
Warm skin and small copper accents create limited focal separation around the head and arm.
defects: The reduced silhouette reads as a conventional dark-clad woman carrying a case or tablet because the fissure mechanism and diagram content do not survive.
Black clothing, hair, and background merge across the torso and legs, leaving little internal hierarchy or combat information.
uncertainties: The native image alone does not establish whether players would identify the occult board, the skin alteration, or the meaning of the open-hand interaction.
